name: Crockpot Barbecue Pork Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Put half the sliced onions at the bottom of the crockpot.
2. Place the meat on top and add the cloves (placed in a cheesecloth bag) and the remaining sliced onions.
3. Add water, cover, and cook for 8 to 12 hours on low.
4. Remove the meat, drain any liquid from the crockpot, and discard it. Also remove the bone and excess fat from the meat.
5. Shred the meat and return it to the crockpot. Add the chopped onion and barbecue sauce (adding more if needed for desired flavor).
6. Cover and cook for an additional 1 to 3 hours on high or 4 to 8 hours on low, stirring two or three times.
Serve the shredded pork from the crockpot over large buns.
